summary: Completed comprehensive frontend-only Playwright testing of the Rajiv Pandit portfolio SPA. All 8 requested feature scenarios validated successfully on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x800). Home hero, navbar, theme toggle (dark<->light with localStorage 'rp-theme' persistence & <html> dark class), projects listing (4 cards), About page (experience x3, 7 skill groups, education), Resume page (Drive download+preview hrefs both containing correct file ID), Footer socials, and mobile hamburger menu (opens, contains 4 links, closes on link click) all pass. No console/page errors captured.

issues: Secondary text (project summary paragraphs, client/role line, tech-stack chip labels) uses --rp-text-secondary that appears extremely low-contrast against the near-black background on dark theme — captured screenshot shows body copy is barely legible. Consider lightening --rp-text-secondary in dark mode or bumping opacity of chip text. Light mode looks fine.

action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW-PRIORITY: Improve dark-mode secondary text contrast on Projects (and possibly Home tagline / About body) — current --rp-text-secondary against --rp-bg is too dim to meet WCAG AA. Bump the secondary color a couple of steps lighter in the dark theme CSS variables.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, componentised and readable; all requested data-testids are present.
ThemeContext correctly guards window/localStorage, toggles 'dark' class on documentElement, and persists to 'rp-theme'.
No backend calls / no REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL usage — matches the 'static SPA' problem statement.
resume.js hardcodes the resume Drive file ID in two URLs — consider extracting the ID once and templating the two URLs to prevent drift.

About page skill-group testid uses slug replace that produces 'skill-group-devops-tooling-' with trailing dash for groups ending in '&' (e.g., 'DevOps & Tooling'). Not blocking (still unique and queryable via prefix selector) but slightly ugly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purely static React SPA (no backend). All 8 review scenarios verified via a single Playwright script hitting REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Key testids used: home-hero, home-heading, home-tagline, home-download-resume, home-view-projects, nav-home/about/projects/resume, theme-toggle (+ -mobile), mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, project-card-{sbi-yono|weconnect|ageas-customer|hms}, about-experience, experience-item-0/1/2, about-skills, about-education, resume-download-btn, resume-view-btn, footer-github/linkedin/email. Only outstanding concern is low contrast of secondary text in dark mode on Projects page.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Contrast issue is a design tuning item, not a functional bug.
